name: Publicly Readable AWS Buckets
query: { buckets( where: { cloudProvider: { eq: "aws" } publicAccessBlocked: { eq: false } OR: [ { hasBucketACLGrant_SOME: { OR: [ { granteeURI: { eq: "http://acs.amazonaws.com/groups/global/AllUsers" } } { granteeURI: { eq: "http://acs.amazonaws.com/groups/global/AuthenticatedUsers" } } ] permission_IN: ["READ", "FULL_CONTROL"] } } { bucketPolicy: { statements_SOME: { effect: { eq: "Allow" } OR: [ { actions_INCLUDES: "s3:GetObject" } { actions_INCLUDES: "s3:ListObjects" } { actions_INCLUDES: "s3:ListObjectsV2" } { actions_INCLUDES: "s3:*" } { actions_INCLUDES: "*" } ] principals_INCLUDES: "AWS|*" } } } ] } ) {...AssetFragment} }
